title: She stepped over bounds:
content:
She stepped over bounds:
And with the flick
Of her wrist,
And with the twirl
Of her hair:
She braided a collar
So very thick--
So very
Nonchalant--
With such little care.
Slipped on yesterday,
Right o'er his neck--
Immediate
And tightly wound--
Simply not fair.
It tore at his flesh,
Each strand caused prick
Looking right
Or looking left
As his gaze followed
Her every subtle trick,
Her coming--
Even more so, her going--
With a bloody stare.
context: From document: She stepped over bounds:
